< Home >

GET restapi/pageurl/treelink

Get the base Url to build a tree link navigation urls.

Request Information

URI Parameters

None.

Body Parameters

None.

Response Information

Resource Description

string

Response Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
"sample string"

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<string xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/">sample string</string>
